chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1168 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.08.2022. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Ayaz Khaskheli, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Abdul Salam Chandio, Advocate for applicants. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO,- Applicants are alleged to have committed robbery of a car and cash from complainant at Indus Highway near Burira Shaakh Mori Dadu on 17.07.2021 when he and his brother Asghar and PW Moharram were travelling in the said car. The FIR of the incident however was registered on 08.11.2021 after more than three and half months, making the case against the applicants to be one of further inquiry. It is informed by the applicants, whose Counsel is called absent, that co-accused Zamir Hussain and Ali Muhammad were arrested and have been granted post arrest bail on merits by the trial Court. Therefore, in addition to above, the rule of consistency also seems to be applicable to the applicants’ case. 2. Learned A.P.G has half heartedly opposed bail. However, for the facts and circumstances as stated above, the application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. The applicants are directed to regularly appear before the trial Court without fail. 3. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
